title: cordia goeldiana
intro: Cordia goeldiana, also known as Sertão Cordia, is a plant species within the Bignoniaceae family, native to the northeastern region of Brazil. The medicinal properties of Cordia goeldiana lie in its leaves, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Cordia goeldiana is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
